arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'considering move' for La Liga midfielder amid Aurelien Tchouameni transfer speculation
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly huge admirers of Athletic Bilbao midfielder Mikel Jauregizar and could move for him at the end of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.sum: Yasmim Ribeiro joins the squad as she awaits her Real Madrid debut. On the other side, Las Blancas sit comfortably in 2nd place with 8 points ahead of Atlético Madrid and two games in hand.

arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without the suspended Vinícius Júnior when they take on Las Palmas in La Liga.

arts.sum: Arsenal have just over two weeks to make new singings before the January transfer window slams shut and RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko has been tipped for a mega £70million move

arts.ttl: Cesc Fàbregas: “Real Madrid can buy Nico Paz back, but at a certain price”
arts.sum: While Real Madrid retains a buy-back clause, Fàbregas made it clear in a recent press conference that Paz is at the heart of Como’s long-term vision. Como 1907 head coach Cesc Fàbregas has lavished praise on Nico Paz, the Argentine midfielder who has emerged as one of Serie A’s brightest talents this season.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Al Hilal eye Salah, Rodrygo to replace Neymar
arts.sum: Al Hilal have identified Mohamed Salah and Rodrygo as possible replacements for Neymar, while Manchester United are reportedly ahead of Manchester City in the race to sign Nuno Mendes . - Saudi Pro League heavyweights Al Hilal want Liverpool's Mohamed Salah or Real Madrid's Rodrygo to replace Neymar, reports Rudy Galetti .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Las Palmas in La Liga on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's five most expensive January transfers of all time
arts.sum: The Spaniard left Man City with 15 senior appearances under his belt and he was required to spend three seasons on loan at AC Milan before finally breaking into the Real Madrid team. Brahim Diaz spent five years at Manchester City, but he wasn’t convinced by his first-team pathway and opted to join Real Madrid for €17m in January 2019.
